text:
Question: What is the departure or arrival time of a specific train?
Answer: See Rabta app for this or visit Pakistan railways website (https://www.pakrailways.gov.pk/train)

metadata.question: What is the departure or arrival time of a specific train?
metadata.answer: See Rabta app for this or visit Pakistan railways website (https://www.pakrailways.gov.pk/train)

text:
Question: Is a seat available for a certain train and date?
Answer: See Rabta app for this.

metadata.question: Is a seat available for a certain train and date?
metadata.answer: See Rabta app for this.

text:
Question: How can I book a train ticket online or from station?
Answer: Each and every step to book train ticket from Rabta app. Easy paisa and jazz cash only/ jazz cash card.

metadata.question: How can I book a train ticket online or from station?
metadata.answer: Each and every step to book train ticket from Rabta app. Easy paisa and jazz cash only/ jazz cash card.

text:
Question: How can I cancel my ticket and request a refund?
Answer: See Rabta app for online ticket, and manual reservation office for paper ticket.

metadata.question: How can I cancel my ticket and request a refund?
metadata.answer: See Rabta app for online ticket, and manual reservation office for paper ticket.

text:
Question: Is my train delayed and what is the expected arrival time?
Answer: Call 117

metadata.question: Is my train delayed and what is the expected arrival time?
metadata.answer: Call 117

text:
Question: What is the ticket price between two cities?
Answer: See Rabta app for this

metadata.question: What is the ticket price between two cities?
metadata.answer: See Rabta app for this

text:
Question: How can I register a complaint regarding staff or service?
Answer: Call 117

metadata.question: How can I register a complaint regarding staff or service?
metadata.answer: Call 117

text:
Question: What should I do if I have complaints about seat availability while travelling?
Answer: Consult with train guard.

metadata.question: What should I do if I have complaints about seat availability while travelling?
metadata.answer: Consult with train guard.

text:
Question: What should I do if I lost my luggage on train or station?
Answer: Consult Nearest station /Calling at 15 Police Helpline

metadata.question: What should I do if I lost my luggage on train or station?
metadata.answer: Consult Nearest station /Calling at 15 Police Helpline

text:
Question: How can I send goods through railway cargo service?
Answer: Call 1217 ptcl inquiry no

metadata.question: How can I send goods through railway cargo service?
metadata.answer: Call 1217 ptcl inquiry no

text:
Question: Are waiting rooms, parking or food facilities available at station?
Answer: Yes paid (VIP) and unpaid (general) both available. Food facility on cash

metadata.question: Are waiting rooms, parking or food facilities available at station?
metadata.answer: Yes paid (VIP) and unpaid (general) both available. Food facility on cash

text:
Question: Does a train operate between two specific cities?
Answer: See Rabta app for this.

metadata.question: Does a train operate between two specific cities?
metadata.answer: See Rabta app for this.

text:
Question: How can I confirm if my online ticket is valid or confirmed?
Answer: Call 117

metadata.question: How can I confirm if my online ticket is valid or confirmed?
metadata.answer: Call 117

text:
Question: Sometimes OTP verification code is not received during new account registration, and in some cases it is also not received during account recovery?
Answer: Call 117

metadata.question: Sometimes OTP verification code is not received during new account registration, and in some cases it is also not received during account recovery?
metadata.answer: Call 117

text:
Question: How to recover Rabta Account?
Answer: CNIC, phone no, email address required. If not further call 117

metadata.question: How to recover Rabta Account?
metadata.answer: CNIC, phone no, email address required. If not further call 117

text:
Question: I booked tickets through Raabta, but transaction failed mis-transaction. How long will it take for amount to be refunded?
Answer: Within 7 working days. Additionally, refund will be credited back to the original payment account, not to the account linked with Raabta.

metadata.question: I booked tickets through Raabta, but transaction failed mis-transaction. How long will it take for amount to be refunded?
metadata.answer: Within 7 working days. Additionally, refund will be credited back to the original payment account, not to the account linked with Raabta.

text:
Question: Are there old age or disability discounts?
Answer: Go to Pakrailgov.pk and download old age form/disability form. Attach 1 copy of CNIC and 1 passport size photographs to each copy of form. 1 copy to be submitted to nearest ticket reservation office, signed by station master. 1 copy of application send to CCM (chief commercial manager) by post (address: CCM office, IT Directorate, Empress Road Lahore).

metadata.question: Are there old age or disability discounts?
metadata.answer: Go to Pakrailgov.pk and download old age form/disability form. Attach 1 copy of CNIC and 1 passport size photographs to each copy of form. 1 copy to be submitted to nearest ticket reservation office, signed by station master. 1 copy of application send to CCM (chief commercial manager) by post (address: CCM office, IT Directorate, Empress Road Lahore).

text:
Question: How to book with military vouchers?
Answer: Booking through reservation office. Person must carry military discount voucher with him.

metadata.question: How to book with military vouchers?
metadata.answer: Booking through reservation office. Person must carry military discount voucher with him.

text:
Question: What are the reservation office timings?
Answer: 09:00 to 20:00 main stations, for small stations: 09:00 - 17:00 hrs

metadata.question: What are the reservation office timings?
metadata.answer: 09:00 to 20:00 main stations, for small stations: 09:00 - 17:00 hrs

text:
Question: What are the freight rates?
Answer: Visit Pakistan railways website (https://www.pakrail.gov.pk/FreightRates.aspx)

metadata.question: What are the freight rates?
metadata.answer: Visit Pakistan railways website (https://www.pakrail.gov.pk/FreightRates.aspx)

text:
Question: Can I book a ticket from anywhere?
Answer: Berths/Seats can be reserved from Railway Reservation Offices, PRACS Reservation Offices and on line E-ticketing (SEE RABTA APP FOR THIS) mobile app.

metadata.question: Can I book a ticket from anywhere?
metadata.answer: Berths/Seats can be reserved from Railway Reservation Offices, PRACS Reservation Offices and on line E-ticketing (SEE RABTA APP FOR THIS) mobile app.

text:
Question: How many days in advance can I reserve my ticket?
Answer: Seats/Berths can be got reserved maximum up to 90 days in advance.

metadata.question: How many days in advance can I reserve my ticket?
metadata.answer: Seats/Berths can be got reserved maximum up to 90 days in advance.

text:
Question: How do I know the reservation status of my ticket?
Answer: From Reservation Offices on a telephone, on personal visit or Pakistan railways helpline or from your account dashboard before departure of train.

metadata.question: How do I know the reservation status of my ticket?
metadata.answer: From Reservation Offices on a telephone, on personal visit or Pakistan railways helpline or from your account dashboard before departure of train.

text:
Question: What are the facilities for computerized reservation?
Answer: Computerized reservation facilities are provided at online E-ticketing mobile app SEE RABTA APP FOR THIS and all main Railway reservation offices.

metadata.question: What are the facilities for computerized reservation?
metadata.answer: Computerized reservation facilities are provided at online E-ticketing mobile app SEE RABTA APP FOR THIS and all main Railway reservation offices.

text:
Question: How do I find out the current status of my unconfirmed ticket?
Answer: By visiting Reservation Office or contacting Train Guard before train departure and Pakistan railways helpline

metadata.question: How do I find out the current status of my unconfirmed ticket?
metadata.answer: By visiting Reservation Office or contacting Train Guard before train departure and Pakistan railways helpline

text:
Question: Do I need to pay to use VIP waiting room at a station?
Answer: Yes Rs 300/- Each person.

metadata.question: Do I need to pay to use VIP waiting room at a station?
metadata.answer: Yes Rs 300/- Each person.

text:
Question: Are there car parking facilities at stations?
Answer: Yes. But Car Parking fee is charged.

metadata.question: Are there car parking facilities at stations?
metadata.answer: Yes. But Car Parking fee is charged.

text:
Question: Is there any transit accommodation available at stations?
Answer: At big stations, retiring rooms are available on payment.

metadata.question: Is there any transit accommodation available at stations?
metadata.answer: At big stations, retiring rooms are available on payment.

text:
Question: Should I have to book in advance?
Answer: Yes. But subject to availability.

metadata.question: Should I have to book in advance?
metadata.answer: Yes. But subject to availability.

text:
Question: Whom should I complain to in case of overcharging or other complaints?
Answer: Reservation office in charge Divisional Commercial Officer; Concerned Division on telephone number given in Railway Time Table.

metadata.question: Whom should I complain to in case of overcharging or other complaints?
metadata.answer: Reservation office in charge Divisional Commercial Officer; Concerned Division on telephone number given in Railway Time Table.

text:
Question: Whom should I contact in case of sub-standard food provided by dining cars?
Answer: In charge Guard may be contacted and complaint may be registered in Complaint Book provided to him or matter may be brought into the notice of Incharge Divisional Commercial Officer.

metadata.question: Whom should I contact in case of sub-standard food provided by dining cars?
metadata.answer: In charge Guard may be contacted and complaint may be registered in Complaint Book provided to him or matter may be brought into the notice of Incharge Divisional Commercial Officer.

text:
Question: Whom should I contact in case of complaint against coolies?
Answer: You may contact Station Manager Incharge or Conductor Guard or Divisional Commercial Officer concerned.

metadata.question: Whom should I contact in case of complaint against coolies?
metadata.answer: You may contact Station Manager Incharge or Conductor Guard or Divisional Commercial Officer concerned.

text:
Question: Are there any facilities for registering complaints and their prompt reply?
Answer: Printed Complaint Book is available with all Station Masters / Guards.

metadata.question: Are there any facilities for registering complaints and their prompt reply?
metadata.answer: Printed Complaint Book is available with all Station Masters / Guards.

text:
Question: Is there any other accommodation available besides retiring rooms?
Answer: No.

metadata.question: Is there any other accommodation available besides retiring rooms?
metadata.answer: No.

text:
Question: Do the railways have hotels at important tourist spots?
Answer: No.

metadata.question: Do the railways have hotels at important tourist spots?
metadata.answer: No.

text:
Question: If I have any suggestions or complaints about the catering facilities or other passenger amenities, whom shall I contact?
Answer: Train Guard, Station Master, or Divisional Commercial Officer.

metadata.question: If I have any suggestions or complaints about the catering facilities or other passenger amenities, whom shall I contact?
metadata.answer: Train Guard, Station Master, or Divisional Commercial Officer.

text:
Question: Whom should I approach in case of any emergency at stations?
Answer: All Divisional Commercial Officers, concerned Station Masters, or Police Help Centre.

metadata.question: Whom should I approach in case of any emergency at stations?
metadata.answer: All Divisional Commercial Officers, concerned Station Masters, or Police Help Centre.

text:
Question: What are weightage of free allowance as luggage in different classes?
Answer: Air-Conditioned (Sleeper) Class: 50 Kilograms, Air-Conditioned Sitter: 20 Kilograms, First Class Sleeper: 20 Kilograms, Air-Conditioned Lower: 20 Kilograms, Economy Class: 20 Kilograms, Second Class: 20 Kilograms.

metadata.question: What are weightage of free allowance as luggage in different classes?
metadata.answer: Air-Conditioned (Sleeper) Class: 50 Kilograms, Air-Conditioned Sitter: 20 Kilograms, First Class Sleeper: 20 Kilograms, Air-Conditioned Lower: 20 Kilograms, Economy Class: 20 Kilograms, Second Class: 20 Kilograms.

text:
Question: Can I book my tickets through travel agents?
Answer: Not allowed.

metadata.question: Can I book my tickets through travel agents?
metadata.answer: Not allowed.

text:
Question: What facilities are available for international tourists?
Answer: They are provided 25% concession in rail fares for all classes.

metadata.question: What facilities are available for international tourists?
metadata.answer: They are provided 25% concession in rail fares for all classes.

text:
Question: Can I break my journey at any intermediate station?
Answer: No break journey is allowed after 240 KMs with in 24 hours.

metadata.question: Can I break my journey at any intermediate station?
metadata.answer: No break journey is allowed after 240 KMs with in 24 hours.

text:
Question: Can I extend my journey beyond the original destination?
Answer: Yes subject to availability of accommodation.

metadata.question: Can I extend my journey beyond the original destination?
metadata.answer: Yes subject to availability of accommodation.

text:
Question: Can I upgrade my ticket to a higher class en route?
Answer: Yes. On payment of extra charges if accommodation is available.

metadata.question: Can I upgrade my ticket to a higher class en route?
metadata.answer: Yes. On payment of extra charges if accommodation is available.

text:
Question: Can my confirmed tickets be transferred to somebody else?
Answer: Tickets are not transferable.

metadata.question: Can my confirmed tickets be transferred to somebody else?
metadata.answer: Tickets are not transferable.

text:
Question: What are different concessions provided to railway passengers?
Answer: Blind Persons 50%, Blind Students 50%, Local Students 50%, Foreign Students 25%, Tourists 50%, Scouts Girls Guides 40%, Sports Athletes 40%, Mentally Orthopedically handicapped Athletes 50%, Members of Chartered Institute of Transport Pakistan Centre 25% and 50%, Senior citizens 50%, 50% ticket discount for spouses (husband or wife) of journalists.

metadata.question: What are different concessions provided to railway passengers?
metadata.answer: Blind Persons 50%, Blind Students 50%, Local Students 50%, Foreign Students 25%, Tourists 50%, Scouts Girls Guides 40%, Sports Athletes 40%, Mentally Orthopedically handicapped Athletes 50%, Members of Chartered Institute of Transport Pakistan Centre 25% and 50%, Senior citizens 50%, 50% ticket discount for spouses (husband or wife) of journalists.
